title: Terra Originum
description: Addon to Origins made for the Celestia SMP
body:
# Terra Originum This is an addon to the [Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) mod made for the Celestia SMP __Required mods__: - [Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins), of course - [Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui), for changing the size of some origins - [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib), for some custom armour - [Icarus](https://modrinth.com/mod/icarus), for some origins

__Origins added__: - Spirit - Demon - Wraith - Shade - Merfolk - Serpenta - Lato - Sylt - Yulde - Kitsune - Florian - Fairy - Muckunde - Mync Descriptions for each origin can be found ingame or on the wiki when it gets updated We are planning on adding many more origins since most of the current origins have a bit of gameplay bias in their creation (?/?)
